summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily ADBE Bull 2X ETF (ADBU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Adobe Inc. (TICKER: ADBE). ADBU was launched on Mar 25, 2026 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Single Stocks Are Driving the Tape – Direxion Launches Four 2X Bull ETFs
data.text: New York, New York, March 25, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Direxion, a leading provider of Single Stock Leveraged & Inverse ETFs, today announced the launch of four new ETFs offering 2X daily exposure to ...
